studies.title: Evaluation of the Impact of DiGA´s in Patients with Type II Diabetes mellitus in daily practice

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the impact of the digital health application Vitadio on patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus. The product name 'Vitadio' is mentioned multiple times in the trial descriptions and scientific summaries, confirming the study's focus on this specific digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicentre, open-controlled observational study with an intraindividual control group, which aligns with real-world evidence (RWE) as it uses observational design features and real-world data collection.

studies.title: Evaluation of the Impact of mebix in Patients with Type II Diabetes mellitus in daily practice

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions Vitadio as an example of digital health applications being investigated for their impact on HbA1c in patients with type 2 diabetes. This indicates that Vitadio is specifically part of the study's focus.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicentre, open-controlled observational study with an intraindividual control group, indicating it is an observational study design collecting real-world evidence rather than a randomized controlled trial.
